hints.text: Overseas **department of France** east of Madagascar — **counts as France**; French infrastructure (signs, bollards, poles)
Street View car w/ **visible side mirrors, roof rack + black tape on the end of the REAR-RIGHT bar**
hints.uniq_note: Ghana's car has the tape on the FRONT-right bar.

hints.text: Mountainous **volcanic tropical island**: coastal roads w/ lush green mountains close by; palms & ferns, pines at elevation, flowering plants
Only a handful of roads covered by car (map) — knowing the covered regions = free points

**Six bus-stop designs = region meta**: yellow = island-wide (alone → region hint); L-shaped white/olive (almost never w/ yellow); pink (rarely w/ yellow); orange (almost always w/ yellow) — infographic
**Sugarcane** in the NE + SW (SW = more built-up); **rectangular front-camera blur** on all coverage north of Saint-Louis
**Cilaos** = town inside a caldera: mountain wall all around + overcast; **Saint-Paul = black bollards / Saint-Denis (capital) = green bollards w/ white balls** at intersections

**Spotlights**: NW N1 = divided, ridge SE + ocean NW (the bridge on the map does NOT exist in the coverage); **Route du Volcan** = Martian brown-red soil + scattered shrubs + white stones lining the road; Route Forestière 58 = dark winding dirt track w/ grass in the middle, pines + eucalyptus; eastern N2 = single carriageway, dense vegetation or empty treeless expanse (least populated region)
